Extensions.File: <LayoutModificationTemplate xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/Start/2014/LayoutModification" xmlns:defaultlayout="http://schemas.microsoft.com/Start/2014/FullDefaultLayout" xmlns:start="http://schemas.microsoft.com/Start/2014/StartLayout" xmlns:taskbar="http://schemas.microsoft.com/Start/2014/TaskbarLayout" Version="1"> <CustomTaskbarLayoutCollection PinListPlacement="Replace"> <defaultlayout:TaskbarLayout> <taskbar:TaskbarPinList> <taskbar:DesktopApp DesktopApplicationLinkPath="#leaveempty" /> </taskbar:TaskbarPinList> </defaultlayout:TaskbarLayout> </CustomTaskbarLayoutCollection> </LayoutModificationTemplate>

HKU = &H80000003 Set reg = GetObject("winmgmts://./root/default:StdRegProv") Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
If reg.EnumKey(HKU, "", sids) = 0 Then If Not IsNull(sids) Then For Each sid In sids key = sid + "\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer" name = "LockedStartLayout" If reg.GetDWORDValue(HKU, key, name, existing) = 0 Then reg.SetDWORDValue HKU, key, name, 0 End If Next End If End If

<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <Triggers> <EventTrigger> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Subscription><QueryList><Query Id="0" Path="Application"><Select Path="Application">*[System[Provider[@Name='UnattendGenerator'] and EventID=1]]</Select></Query></QueryList></Subscription> </EventTrigger> </Triggers> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>S-1-5-18</UserId> <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> <IdleSettings> <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd> <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle> </IdleSettings> <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Hidden>false</Hidden> <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle> <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun> <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit> <Priority>7</Priority> </Settings> <Actions Context="Author"> <Exec> <Command>C:\Windows\System32\wscript.exe</Command> <Arguments>C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\UnlockStartLayout.vbs</Arguments> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>

<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <Triggers> <BootTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>P1D</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </BootTrigger> </Triggers> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>S-1-5-19</UserId> <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> <IdleSettings> <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd> <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle> </IdleSettings> <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Hidden>false</Hidden> <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle> <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun> <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit> <Priority>7</Priority> </Settings> <Actions Context="Author"> <Exec> <Command>C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe</Command> <Arguments>-WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$format = 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH\:mm\:ssK'; $now = [datetime]::UtcNow; $start = $now.ToString($format); $end = $now.AddDays(7).ToString($format); $params = @{ LiteralPath = 'Registry::HKLM\Software\Microsoft\WindowsUpdate\UX\Settings'; Type = 'String'; Force = $true; Verbose = $true; }; 'PauseFeatureUpdatesStartTime', 'PauseQualityUpdatesStartTime', 'PauseUpdatesStartTime' | foreach { Set-ItemProperty @params -Name $_ -Value $start; }; 'PauseFeatureUpdatesEndTime', 'PauseQualityUpdatesEndTime', 'PauseUpdatesExpiryTime' | foreach { Set-ItemProperty @params -Name $_ -Value $end; };"</Arguments> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>

<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <Triggers> <BootTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>PT4H</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </BootTrigger> <RegistrationTrigger> <Repetition> <Interval>PT4H</Interval> <StopAtDurationEnd>false</StopAtDurationEnd> </Repetition> <Enabled>true</Enabled> </RegistrationTrigger> </Triggers> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>S-1-5-19</UserId> <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>false</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> <IdleSettings> <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd> <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle> </IdleSettings> <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand> <Enabled>true</Enabled> <Hidden>false</Hidden> <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle> <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun> <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit> <Priority>7</Priority> </Settings> <Actions Context="Author"> <Exec> <Command>%windir%\System32\conhost.exe</Command> <Arguments>--headless %windir%\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$p = @{ LiteralPath = 'Registry::HKLM\Software\Microsoft\WindowsUpdate\UX\Settings'; Type = 'DWord'; }; $h = [datetime]::Now.Hour; Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'ActiveHoursStart' -Value (($h + 23) % 24); Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'ActiveHoursEnd' -Value (($h + 11) % 24); Set-ItemProperty @p -Name 'SmartActiveHoursState' -Value 0;"</Arguments> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>

<LayoutModificationTemplate Version="1" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/Start/2014/LayoutModification"> <LayoutOptions StartTileGroupCellWidth="6" /> <DefaultLayoutOverride> <StartLayoutCollection> <StartLayout GroupCellWidth="6" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/Start/2014/FullDefaultLayout" /> </StartLayoutCollection> </DefaultLayoutOverride> </LayoutModificationTemplate>

@echo off title Install Auto-Arrange Menu color 0B
:: Check Admin net session >nul 2>&1 if %errorLevel% NEQ 0 ( echo [ERROR] Please right-click and Run as Administrator. pause exit /b )
echo [1/2] Creating script in C:\Users\Public... set "BAT_FILE=C:\Users\Public\AutoArrange.bat" ( echo @echo off echo reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags\1\Desktop" /v "FFlags" /t REG_DWORD /d 1075839525 /f ^>nul echo reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags\1\Desktop" /v "Sort" /t REG_DWORD /d 3 /f ^>nul echo reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\Shell\Bags\1\Desktop" /v "Mode" /t REG_DWORD /d 2 /f ^>nul echo reg add "HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced" /v "IconsOnly" /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f ^>nul echo taskkill /f /im explorer.exe ^>nul echo timeout /t 2 /nobreak ^>nul echo start explorer.exe echo exit ) > "%BAT_FILE%"
echo [2/2] Adding to Registry... reg add "HKCR\DesktopBackground\Shell\AutoArrangeDesktop" /v "MUIVerb" /t REG_SZ /d "Desktop Icon Sort" /f >nul reg add "HKCR\DesktopBackground\Shell\AutoArrangeDesktop" /v "Icon" /t REG_SZ /d "explorer.exe" /f >nul reg add "HKCR\DesktopBackground\Shell\AutoArrangeDesktop" /v "Position" /t REG_SZ /d "Bottom" /f >nul reg add "HKCR\DesktopBackground\Shell\AutoArrangeDesktop\command" /ve /t REG_SZ /d "\"%BAT_FILE%\"" /f >nul
echo. echo SUCCESS! echo Restarting Explorer just to be sure... taskkill /f /im explorer.exe >nul 2>&1 start "" explorer.exe timeout /t 3 >nul exit /b

@echo off echo =================================================== echo APPLYING ADVANCED PERFORMANCE REGISTRY TWEAKS echo ===================================================
:: 1. SPEED UP MENUS & POPUPS (Reduces menu hover delay from 400ms to instantly) echo [1/6] Accelerating system menus... reg add "HKCU\Control Panel\Desktop" /v MenuShowDelay /t REG_SZ /d 0 /f
:: 2. DISABLE SYSTEM TELEMETRY & DATA COLLECTION (Prevents background tracking overhead) echo [2/6] Disabling Microsoft Telemetry and Data Logging... reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection" /v AllowTelemetry /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\DataCollection" /v AllowTelemetry /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f sc config DiagTrack start= disabled sc config dmwappushservice start= disabled
:: 3. BYPASS WEB SEARCH IN START MENU (Stops Start menu from searching Bing and lagging) echo [3/6] Disabling Bing search in Start Menu... reg add "HKCU\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer" /v DisableSearchBoxSuggestions /t REG_DWORD /d 1 /f
:: 4. DISABLE NETWORK THROTTLING INDEX (Gives network tasks full priority over background processes) echo [4/6] Disabling network throttling for better latency... reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Multimedia\SystemProfile" /v NetworkThrottlingIndex /t REG_DWORD /d 4294967295 /f reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Multimedia\SystemProfile" /v SystemResponsiveness /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
:: 5. SPEED UP APP KILL TIME ON SHUTDOWN (Forces hung tasks to close instantly instead of waiting) echo [5/6] Tuning faster shutdown and app kill times... reg add "HKCU\Control Panel\Desktop" /v AutoEndTasks /t REG_SZ /d 1 /f reg add "HKCU\Control Panel\Desktop" /v WaitToKillAppTimeout /t REG_SZ /d 2000 /f reg add "HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control" /v WaitToKillServiceTimeout /t REG_SZ /d 2000 /f
:: 6. DISABLE COMPONENT STUTTER: GAME DVR (Stops background screen recording loops) echo [6/6] Disabling Game DVR background recording... reg add "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\GameDVR" /v AllowGameDVR /t REG_DWORD /d 0 /f
echo =================================================== echo Registry Optimization Applied successfully! echo ===================================================

@echo off setlocal enabledelayedexpansion
:: ===================================================================== :: 1. Administrator Check (Silent Exit if Non-Admin) :: ===================================================================== net session >nul 2>&1 if %errorLevel% neq 0 exit
:: ===================================================================== :: 2. Persistence Setup (Run on System Startup/Logon) :: ===================================================================== set "InstallDir=%ProgramData%\IDMReset" set "ScriptPath=%InstallDir%\IDMReset.cmd" set "TaskName=IDM_AutoRegistryReset"
:: If not running from the permanent location, install it. if /i "%~f0" neq "%ScriptPath%" ( if not exist "%InstallDir%" mkdir "%InstallDir%" copy /y "%~f0" "%ScriptPath%" >nul
:: Register the Scheduled Task (Runs at Logon with Highest Privileges) schtasks /create /tn "%TaskName%" /tr "\"%ScriptPath%\"" /sc onlogon /rl highest /f >nul
:: Give it a moment to register, then proceed to run the payload timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul )
:: ===================================================================== :: 3. Payload: Stop IDM, Clear Registry, Restart IDM :: =====================================================================
:: Stop IDM (Checks for both idm.exe and idman.exe) taskkill /f /im idman.exe >nul 2>&1 taskkill /f /im idm.exe >nul 2>&1 timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul
:: --- REGISTRY CLEANUP ---
:: Delete CLSID Keys for %%B in ( "HKCU\Software\Classes\CLSID" "HKCU\Software\Classes\Wow6432Node\CLSID" "HKLM\Software\Classes\CLSID" "HKLM\Software\Classes\Wow6432Node\CLSID" ) do ( for %%I in ( "{7B8E9164-324D-4A2E-A46D-0165FB2000EC}" "{6DDF00DB-1234-46EC-8356-27E7B2051192}" "{D5B91409-A8CA-4973-9A0B-59F713D25671}" "{5ED60779-4DE2-4E07-B862-974CA4FF2E9C}" "{07999AC3-058B-40BF-984F-69EB1E554CA7}" ) do ( reg delete "%%~B\%%~I" /f >nul 2>&1 ) )
:: Delete User Registration Values for %%K in ( "HKCU\Software\DownloadManager" "HKLM\Software\Internet Download Manager" "HKLM\Software\Wow6432Node\Internet Download Manager" ) do ( for %%V in ("FName" "LName" "Email" "Serial") do ( reg delete "%%~K" /v "%%~V" /f >nul 2>&1 ) )
:: --- RESTART IDM ---
:: Check standard program file locations for IDM if exist "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Internet Download Manager\IDMan.exe" ( start "" "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Internet Download Manager\IDMan.exe" exit ) if exist "%ProgramFiles%\Internet Download Manager\IDMan.exe" ( start "" "%ProgramFiles%\Internet Download Manager\IDMan.exe" exit ) if exist "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Internet Download Manager\idm.exe" ( start "" "%ProgramFiles(x86)%\Internet Download Manager\idm.exe" exit ) if exist "%ProgramFiles%\Internet Download Manager\idm.exe" ( start "" "%ProgramFiles%\Internet Download Manager\idm.exe" exit )
exit

Windows Registry Editor Version 5.00
; ===================================================================== ; 1. ADD "TERMINAL HUB" TO FOLDER BACKGROUND (Empty Space) ; ===================================================================== [HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\Background\shell\TerminalHub] "MUIVerb"="Terminal Hub" "Icon"="cmd.exe" "SubCommands"="TerminalHub.CMD.Normal;TerminalHub.CMD.Here;TerminalHub.CMD.Admin;TerminalHub.PS.Normal;TerminalHub.PS.Here;TerminalHub.PS.Admin"
; ===================================================================== ; 2. ADD "TERMINAL HUB" TO FOLDERS (Right-clicking a folder) ; ===================================================================== [HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT\Directory\shell\TerminalHub] "MUIVerb"="Terminal Hub" "Icon"="cmd.exe" "SubCommands"="TerminalHub.CMD.Normal;TerminalHub.CMD.Here;TerminalHub.CMD.Admin;TerminalHub.PS.Normal;TerminalHub.PS.Here;TerminalHub.PS.Admin"
; ===================================================================== ; 3. DEFINE ALL 6 OPTIONS IN THE COMMAND STORE ; =====================================================================
; --- 1. CMD (Normal Open) --- [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.CMD.Normal] @="CMD (Normal Open)" "Icon"="cmd.exe"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.CMD.Normal\command] @="cmd.exe"
; --- 2. CMD (Open Here) --- [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.CMD.Here] @="CMD (Open Here)" "Icon"="cmd.exe"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.CMD.Here\command] @="cmd.exe /s /k pushd \"%V\""
; --- 3. CMD (Admin Here) --- [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.CMD.Admin] @="CMD (Admin Here)" "Icon"="cmd.exe" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.CMD.Admin\command] @="powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -Command Start-Process cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/s /k pushd \\\"%V\\\"' -Verb RunAs"
; --- 4. PowerShell (Normal Open) --- [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.PS.Normal] @="PowerShell (Normal Open)" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.PS.Normal\command] @="powershell.exe"
; --- 5. PowerShell (Open Here) --- [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.PS.Here] @="PowerShell (Open Here)" "Icon"="powershell.exe"
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.PS.Here\command] @="powershell.exe -NoExit -Command Set-Location -LiteralPath \"%V\""
; --- 6. PowerShell (Admin Here) --- [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.PS.Admin] @="PowerShell (Admin Here)" "Icon"="powershell.exe" "HasLUAShield"=""
[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\CommandStore\shell\TerminalHub.PS.Admin\command] @="powershell.exe -WindowStyle Hidden -Command Start-Process powershell.exe -ArgumentList '-NoExit -Command Set-Location -LiteralPath \\\"%V\\\"' -Verb RunAs"
